directives.hook: Three origins. Three months. Zero commitment.
directives.body_copy: Ethiopian Yirgacheffe, Colombian La Esperanza, Guatemalan Huehuetenango. Each slow-steeped 18 hours. Discover your favorite single-origin.
directives.visual_concept: Three-panel split screen showing each single-origin bottle against Cream backgrounds with origin names in Espresso typography. Final frame shows all three bottles together with Copper CTA overlay.
directives.reasoning: Multi-origin carousel format worked before. Removes subscription pressure by leading with sampler concept. Stays product-focused, highlights 18-hour process, uses specific origin names.

directives.hook: POV: you're trying three single-origins in three months
directives.body_copy: Ethiopian Yirgacheffe. Colombian La Esperanza. Guatemalan Huehuetenango. All slow-steeped 18 hours. Find your favorite without subscribing.
directives.visual_concept: Handheld POV shot: three bottles lined up on kitchen counter, natural morning light. Hand enters frame, picks up first bottle, pours into glass. Quick cut to tasting notes text overlay. Captions on throughout.
directives.voiceover_script: Three months, three single-origins, zero pressure. Ethiopian Yirgacheffe with bergamot notes. Colombian La Esperanza. Guatemalan Huehuetenango. Slow-steeped 18 hours each. Try the sampler.
directives.reasoning: POV hook mirrors top TikTok performer. Handheld aesthetic feels native. Specific origin names and tasting notes build credibility. No subscription pressure in first seconds.

directives.hook: Single-origin cold brew, no subscription required.
directives.body_copy: Three bottles. Three months. Ethiopian, Colombian, Guatemalan. Each slow-steeped 18 hours. Discover your favorite before you commit.
directives.visual_concept: Founder Maya voiceover over close-up brewing footage: coffee grounds, slow-steep tanks, bottling line. Cut to three bottles on wooden table with origin cards. Final frame: hand reaching for bottle with Copper CTA.
directives.voiceover_script: We slow-steep every batch for 18 hours. Ethiopian Yirgacheffe with bergamot notes. Colombian La Esperanza. Guatemalan Huehuetenango. The 3-month sampler lets you try all three single-origins before you subscribe. Find your favorite first.
directives.reasoning: Founder voiceover worked well in top Meta performer. Process storytelling builds trust. Longer format allows full origin story. Removes subscription friction by positioning sampler as discovery tool.

shared_messaging.primary_value_prop: The 3-month sampler lets you discover your favorite single-origin cold brew without committing to a subscription.
proof_points: Three distinct single-origins: Ethiopian Yirgacheffe, Colombian La Esperanza, Guatemalan Huehuetenango
No subscription required — try before you commit
shared_messaging.tone_summary: Confident and specific, leading with product quality and origin stories, removing subscription pressure by framing the sampler as a discovery tool.

retrieved_inspiration.relevance: Multi-origin carousel format for Meta, subscription positioning, learned to remove early subscription pressure
POV-style TikTok hook, handheld pour aesthetic, specific tasting notes, native feel
Founder voiceover, process storytelling, brewing close-ups, freshness narrative for YouTube Shorts
